description:
Recommend our platform and earn extra rewards. For each company that registers through your referral link and verifies its phone number, you’ll receive {{pointsReferralCompany}} points.

The company that creates an account not previously registered in our system will receive a 30-day free trial with the {{planFreeTrialCompany}} plan.

Additionally, for every user who joins through your referral and verifies their phone number (not previously registered in our system), you’ll earn another {{pointsReferralUser}} points to your account.
information: Simply share your unique code or QR code with someone who wants to create an account. This way, you can earn rewards from every referral.
noActiveReferral: You don't have an active referral program. 😓
title: Earn more with referrals!
titleCode: Code to enter manually on the registration page
